components.value: V, S, F (miniature shovel costing 10 gp)

saving_throw.value: Reflex partial; to avoid falling prone in an adjacent square and taking 1d6 points of damage. A creature that makes its still stumbles ever so slightly and takes a -1 penalty on all rolls and checks for 1 round. The spell has no effect on creatures adjacent to the square containing the hole. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide . Copyright 2010, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Author: Jason Bulmahn

description.value: You create a shallow extra-dimensional hole perfectly sized to trip anyone who steps within it. This hole occupies a single 5-foot square with a depth of six inches.
